# Rapid Receptionist

> Rapid Receptionist is an AI-powered receptionist service built exclusively for UK tradesmen. It answers calls, messages, and enquiries across up to 8 communication channels — 24/7/365 — so tradesmen never lose a job to a missed call. Pricing starts at £49/month for the Starter plan (phone + web chat with 120 minutes), with the Core plan at £95/month (300 minutes) and additional channels available from £23/month each.

Rapid Receptionist serves 13 UK trade sectors with AI receptionists trained in trade-specific vocabulary and scenarios. The service is not a lead generation company, marketing agency, or CRM platform — it does one thing: answers enquiries instantly so tradesmen capture every lead.

Key facts:
- **Pricing:** Starter plan £49/month (phone 120 mins + web chat), Core plan £95/month (phone 300 mins + web chat), add-on channels £23/month each, All Channels bundle £177/month
- **Setup:** £295 one-time done-for-you setup (fully refundable within 30 days)
- **Guarantee:** 30-day full money-back guarantee (setup fee + monthly fee)
- **Contracts:** None — cancel anytime
- **Coverage:** 24/7/365 including weekends, bank holidays, and overnight

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/): Overview of the AI receptionist service for UK tradesmen
- [Pricing](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/pricing/): Transparent 3-tier pricing — Starter £49/mo, Core £95/mo, add-ons £23/mo each, All Channels £177/mo
- [About](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/about/): The "Built by Tradesmen, for Tradesmen" story
- [Get Started](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/get-started/): Sign up and onboarding
- [Contact](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/contact/): Get in touch — typically responds within 2 hours
- [Privacy Policy](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/privacy/): UK GDPR-compliant data handling policy

## Communication Channels

- [AI Phone Answering](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-phone-answering-for-tradesmen/): Flagship channel — answers calls with the tradesman's business name, full conversation
- [AI Website Chat](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-website-chat-for-tradesmen/): Live chat widget that converts website visitors into leads
- [AI WhatsApp](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-whatsapp-for-tradesmen/): Instant professional replies to WhatsApp messages
- [AI SMS](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-sms-for-tradesmen/): Professional text message responses to enquiries
- [AI Email](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-email-response-for-tradesmen/): Acknowledges email enquiries with professional first response
- [AI Facebook Messenger](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-facebook-messenger-for-tradesmen/): Captures leads from Facebook business page messages
- [AI Instagram DMs](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-instagram-dms-for-tradesmen/): Responds to Instagram direct messages
- [Missed Call Text-Back](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-missed-call-text-back-for-tradesmen/): Safety net — automatic text when a call is missed

## Trades Served

- [Plumbers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-plumbers/): AI receptionist for UK plumbers
- [Electricians](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-electricians/): AI receptionist for UK electricians
- [Locksmiths](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-locksmiths/): AI receptionist for UK locksmiths
- [Gas Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-gas-engineers/): AI receptionist for UK gas engineers
- [Drainage Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-drainage-engineers/): AI receptionist for UK drainage engineers
- [Glaziers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-glaziers/): AI receptionist for UK glaziers
- [Roofers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-roofers/): AI receptionist for UK roofers
- [HVAC Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-hvac-engineers/): AI receptionist for UK HVAC engineers
- [Alarm & Security Installers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-alarm-security-installers/): AI receptionist for UK alarm installers
- [Pest Control](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-pest-control/): AI receptionist for UK pest control businesses
- [Garage Door Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-garage-door-engineers/): AI receptionist for UK garage door engineers
- [Builders](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-builders/): AI receptionist for UK builders
- [Appliance Repair Engineers](https://rapidreceptionist.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-appliance-repair-engineers/): AI receptionist for UK appliance repair businesses
